_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.BackendStg: Peruri backend staging URL for user authentication. Corrected: https://backendservicestg.e-meterai.co.id. Full path: POST /api/users/login
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.Stampv2Stg: Peruri stamp v2 staging URL for e-meterai allotment. Corrected: https://stampv2stg.e-meterai.co.id. Full path: POST /chanel/stampv2
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.InventoryStg: Peruri inventory staging URL for inventory management
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.User: Peruri service account username for authentication
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.Password: Peruri service account password for authentication
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.KeyStamp: KeyStamp Docker adapter URL for on-premise PDF signing. Corrected: http://localhost:9999. Full path: POST /adapter/pdfsigning/rest/docSigningZ
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.SharedFolder: Shared folder path for Docker volume (used for PDF exchange between API and signing adapter)
_comment_Peruri_Corrected_Wp2.TokenExpiryBufferMinutes: Token expiry buffer in minutes (tokens will be refreshed this many minutes before actual expiry)

_comment_Usage.OnPremise: When configured, the stamping endpoint will use on-premise flow: PDF -> shared folder -> Peruri API -> Docker adapter -> signed PDF
_comment_Usage.Fallback: If Peruri options are not configured, the system falls back to cloud-based Peruri PDS service
